/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/system_profile_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/SystemProfile.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_system_profile.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_system_profile  -ldl -lm
